mapper.update: UPDATE dispatch_queue SET status = 'PENDING', next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND UNIX_TIMESTAMP(update_time) * 1000 < #{stuckBefore}
UPDATE dispatch_queue SET status = 'PROCESSING', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE dispatch_queue SET status = 'SUCCESS', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dispatch_queue SET status = 'PENDING', retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, payload = #{payload}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'
UPDATE dispatch_queue SET status = 'DEAD', payload = #{payload}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
